issue_summary: Throw a DimensionMismatchException if dimension of constraints and objective function does not match in SimplexSolver.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Build a tableau for a linear problem.
     * @param f linear objective function
     * @param constraints linear constraints
     * @param goalType type of optimization goal: either {@link GoalType#MAXIMIZE} or {@link GoalType#MINIMIZE}
     * @param restrictToNonNegative whether to restrict the variables to non-negative values
     * @param epsilon amount of error to accept when checking for optimality
     * @param maxUlps amount of error to accept in floating point comparisons
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Build a tableau for a linear problem.
     * @param f linear objective function
     * @param constraints linear constraints
     * @param goalType type of optimization goal: either {@link GoalType#MAXIMIZE} or {@link GoalType#MINIMIZE}
     * @param restrictToNonNegative whether to restrict the variables to non-negative values
     * @param epsilon amount of error to accept when checking for optimality
     * @param maxUlps amount of error to accept in floating point comparisons
     * @throws DimensionMismatchException if the dimension of the constraints does not match the
     *   dimension of the objective function
     */
